speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Predictions
questions: Do you think it will rain this week?
What will you do this evening?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I think it will rain later this week. No, I won't be too busy tomorrow. I will probably relax at home this evening.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 2: Describe a plan

cueCard.topic: Describe a plan you have for the near future.
bullets: when you are going to do it
and explain why this plan is important to you

speaking.sampleAnswer: I am going to visit my hometown next weekend. I already booked the train ticket and arranged everything. This plan is important to me because it was a long time ago when I last saw my family.
